About Me
Turning raw footage
into premium content.

I'm a video editor obsessed with upscaling creators' content — turning raw footage into polished, scroll-stopping videos that grow audiences and build brands.

Specialized in YouTube long-forms, Reels, Shorts, and branded content. I combine technical precision with creative storytelling to make every second count.

Whether you're a solo creator or a growing brand, I help your content look, feel, and perform at its absolute best.

What I Offer
Services
🎬
YouTube Video Editing
Long-form video editing optimized for watch time, retention, and audience growth. Hooks, pacing, b-roll, and storytelling all dialled in.
📱
Reels & Shorts Editing
Scroll-stopping short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts — fast cuts, trending formats, and viral hooks built in.
🎨
Color Grading
Professional color correction and grading to give your footage a cinematic, consistent look that builds your visual identity.
🎵
Audio Design
Clean audio mixing, SFX layering, and music selection to make your content sound as polished as it looks.
✍️
Motion Typography
Custom animated text, titles, lower thirds, and captions that elevate your content's visual language and keep viewers engaged.
📦
Full Content Package
End-to-end editing package — from raw footage to final export, thumbnail-ready stills, and platform-optimized formats.
How It Works
My Process
01
Discovery
You share your raw footage, references, and vision for the video.
02
Edit
I craft the first cut — pacing, story, transitions, and effects.
03
Revise
Your feedback is applied. We refine until it's perfect.
04
Deliver
Final export in your required format — ready to publish.
